exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Keep chest up and knees behind toes
Press through heels to return to start

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold kettlebell or dumbbell at chest level
Stand with feet slightly wider than shoulders
Keep chest up and core tight
Descend until thighs parallel to floor
Drive through heels to stand up

exercises.name: Back Squat
instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly outward
Keep chest up and core tight
Descend until thighs parallel to floor
Drive through heels to stand up

exercises.name: Front Squat
instructions: Keep elbows high and chest up

exercises.name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand behind barbell with feet hip-width apart
Hinge at hips, keep back flat
Drive through legs to stand upright

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips, knees slightly bent

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips with kettlebell between legs
Use hips, not arms, for power

exercises.name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on bench, feet planted
Grip barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width

exercises.name: Dumbbell Press
instructions: Lie flat on bench with dumbbells
Start with elbows bent at 90 degrees

exercises.name: Incline Press
instructions: Lie on incline bench at 30-45 degrees

exercises.name: Push-up
instructions: Place hands slightly wider than shoulder-width
Engage core, keep body in straight line
Press upward until arms fully extend

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push-up
instructions: Keep elbows tucked in close to body

exercises.name: Dips
instructions: Grip dip bars with hands shoulder-width
Go down until arms reach 90 degrees
Press back up to starting position
Keep torso upright for chest focus
Lean forward for more chest involvement

exercises.name: Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand with weight at shoulder level
Press weight upward until arms extend

exercises.name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with dumbbells at shoulder level
Press upward while rotating palms outward

exercises.name: Pull-ups
instructions: Grip bar with palms facing away
Engage lats and pull body up
Lower with control to full extension

exercises.name: Chin-ups
instructions: Grip bar with palms facing toward you
Pull body up until chin clears bar
Lower with control to full extension

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit on machine with thighs under pad
Grip bar with hands wider than shoulders
Pull bar down to upper chest
Keep chest up and core engaged

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit on seat with knees bent
Keep chest up and back straight

exercises.name: Bent-over Row
instructions: Grip with hands slightly wider than shoulders

exercises.name: Single-arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one knee and hand on bench
Keep back flat and core engaged

exercises.name: Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand with weights at arm's length

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with palms facing each other

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine
Push bar down until arms extend

exercises.name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine

exercises.name: Side Plank
instructions: Stack feet on top of each other
Keep top hand on hip or extend upward

exercises.name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit on floor with knees bent
Hold medicine ball at chest level
Twist torso to right, then left

exercises.name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent
Raise arms and legs toward ceiling

exercises.name: Lunge
instructions: Lower body until front thigh parallel to floor
Keep back straight, front knee at 90-degree angle
Push through front heel to stand
Reset for next rep on other side

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Lower body until knees at 90 degrees
Push through front heel to stand

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Push off front foot to walk forward

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Lower body until front knee at 90 degrees
Push through front foot to stand

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Keep chest up and back straight
Push off lead foot to center

exercises.name: Butterfly Stretch
instructions: Sit with knees bent, soles together

exercises.name: Hip Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent
Feet flat on floor hip-width apart
Lift hips until body forms straight line

exercises.name: Single-leg Hip Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent
Lift hips until body forms straight line

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Face down on machine with ankles secured
Lower torso until parallel to floor
Use hamstrings to pull back up

exercises.name: Face Pull
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine

exercises.name: Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on hyperextension bench
Lower torso until parallel to floor
Raise back up to starting position
Focus on glute and back activation

exercises.name: Reverse Hyperextension
instructions: Keep lower back pressed into bench

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
instructions: Carry weights for duration or distance

exercises.name: Overhead Carry
instructions: Hold weight overhead with one or both hands

exercises.name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand facing box with feet shoulder-width
Bend knees, swing arms for momentum

exercises.name: Broad Jump
instructions: Jump forward as far as possible

exercises.name: Burpee
instructions: Jump feet back into plank position

exercises.name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope handles with relaxed grip
Swing rope overhead and under feet
Jump just high enough to clear rope
Land softly on balls of feet

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
instructions: Walk forward with hands and feet

exercises.name: Crab Walk
instructions: Sit on floor with hands behind shoulders
Walk forward with hands and feet

exercises.name: Sled Push
instructions: Stand behind sled with arms extended
Drive through legs to push sled

exercises.name: Sled Pull
instructions: Drive through legs to pull sled

exercises.name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Grab rope ends in each hand
Keep chest up and back straight

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips with kettlebell between legs
Use hips, not arms, for power

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Stand with feet slightly wider than shoulders
Keep chest up and core tight
Descend until thighs parallel to floor
Drive through heels to stand up

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips with flat back
Drive through legs to stand up

exercises.name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-up
instructions: Roll to side and knee up

exercises.name: Wall Ball
instructions: Stand and throw ball at wall

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Rotational Throw
instructions: Rotate and throw ball against wall

exercises.name: Woodchopper
instructions: Rotate and pull handle diagonally down

exercises.name: Landmine Press
instructions: Press barbell upward at slight angle

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine

exercises.name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine
Push bar down until arms extend

exercises.name: Cable Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand in front of cable machine

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Keep chest up and core engaged

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with bar over chest
Grip bar slightly wider than shoulders

exercises.name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand with bar at shoulder level
Press bar upward until arms extend

exercises.name: Smith Machine Row
instructions: Sit on bench with chest pad

exercises.name: Smith Machine Shrug
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
instructions: Stand with balls of feet on platform

exercises.name: Smith Machine Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with bar on hips

exercises.name: Smith Machine Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs
Hinge at hips with slight knee bend

exercises.name: Smith Machine Tricep Extension
instructions: Lie on bench with bar over chest

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hammer Curl
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs
Grip bar with palms facing each other

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Curl
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs
Grip bar with palms facing down

exercises.name: Smith Machine Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit on bench with wrists on pad

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit on bench with wrists on pad
Hold bar with hands over bench

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Press
instructions: Sit on machine with feet on platform

exercises.name: Smith Machine Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine

exercises.name: Smith Machine Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Lower torso until parallel to floor
Use hamstrings to pull back up

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on hyperextension bench
Lower torso until parallel to floor
Raise back up to starting position
Focus on glute and back activation

exercises.name: Smith Machine Reverse Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on hyperextension bench
Keep lower back pressed into bench

exercises.name: Smith Machine Front Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells in front of thighs
Raise arms forward to shoulder height

exercises.name: Smith Machine Upright Row
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs

exercises.name: Smith Machine Shrug
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs

exercises.name: Smith Machine Curl
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs

exercises.name: Smith Machine Tricep Extension
instructions: Lie on bench with bar over chest

exercises.name: Smith Machine Overhead Press
instructions: Sit or stand with bar at shoulder level
Press bar upward until arms extend

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with bar over chest
Grip bar slightly wider than shoulders

exercises.name: Smith Machine Row
instructions: Sit on bench with chest pad

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Keep chest up and core engaged

exercises.name: Smith Machine Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand with bar in front of thighs
Hinge at hips with slight knee bend

exercises.name: Smith Machine Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with bar on hips

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
instructions: Stand with balls of feet on platform

exercises.name: Smith Machine Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine
